children.text: Assessment of progress in wetlands conservation

children.tail: , the Secretary, in cooperation with the Council, to further the purposes of the chapter shall—

children.text: develop and implement a strategy to assist in the implementation of this Act in conserving the full complement of North American wetlands systems and species dependent on those systems, that incorporates information existing on the date of the issuance of the strategy in final form on types of wetlands habitats and species dependent on the habitats; and
develop and implement procedures to monitor and evaluate the effectiveness of wetlands conservation projects completed under this chapter.
